# Bitmask Status Calculator

Bitmask Status Calculator is a single-page developer utility that converts:
- Decimal/binary bitmasks -> active status flags
- Selected status flags -> decimal and binary values

## Purpose

Help developers quickly inspect and compose bitmask flag values from a pasted status dictionary.

## Input Support

- JSON object dictionaries
- JavaScript object-like dictionaries (parsed safely, no eval)
- Decimal bitmask input
- Binary bitmask input (e.g. 1010 or 0b1010)

## Core Behavior

1. Dictionary parsing to key/value status flags
2. Decimal/binary to flags using bitwise AND
3. Flags to decimal/binary using bitwise OR
4. Local persistence of dictionary input
5. Light and dark mode with persisted preference

## Tech Stack

- Astro
- Vue 3 + TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Bun

## Key Files

- src/components/BitmaskStatusCalculator.vue
- src/components/bitmask/DictionaryInputPanel.vue
- src/components/bitmask/DecimalToFlagsPanel.vue
- src/components/bitmask/FlagsToDecimalPanel.vue
- src/lib/bitmask/parser.ts
- src/lib/bitmask/math.ts

## Deployment

Static output deployed to Cloudflare Pages.
